notes: The official verl source is pinned by commit and should be imported before any installed verl package.
vLLM 0.18.0 was selected because the official verl Qwen3.5 example pins this vLLM generation; Qwen3.5 config loading requires the editable transformers main checkout recorded above.
Flash Attention is not installed in this .venv, so smoke scripts force attn_implementation=sdpa.
Only one GPU was visible during the probe, so three-GPU smoke scripts are present but were not executed.
